scripts.dev:dashboard: npm run build --workspace @zendesk/zendesk-client && npm run dev --workspace @zendesk/dashboard-ui
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace @zendesk/zendesk-client && npm run dev --workspace @zendesk/metrics-api
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build --workspace @zendesk/zendesk-client && npm run dev --workspace @zendesk/worker
scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @zendesk/zendesk-client && concurrently -k -n api,worker,ui -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @zendesk/metrics-api" "npm run dev --workspace @zendesk/worker" "npm run dev --workspace @zendesk/dashboard-ui"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @zendesk/zendesk-client && npm run build --workspace @zendesk/metrics-api && npm run build --workspace @zendesk/worker && npm run build --workspace @zendesk/dashboard-ui
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @zendesk/zendesk-client && npm run typecheck --workspace @zendesk/metrics-api && npm run typecheck --workspace @zendesk/worker && npm run typecheck --workspace @zendesk/dashboard-ui
